/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/test/BplusTreeTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/src/storage/DiskManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/src/storage/BufferPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/src/storage/page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/src/storage/rid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/src/storage/b_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/src/storage/b_tree_leaf_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BplusTreeTest.dir/src/storage/b_tree_internal_page.cpp.o -o BplusTreeTest
